case_title: LOPEZ FRANCISCA VS SETO DENNIS et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SETO DENNIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY LOPEZ FRANCISCA AS TO DEFENDANT SETO DENNIS SETO CHUI KING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
